operations.source_call: netstream.Start(client, "plyData", target:getChar():getData("txt"), target:Name().." ["..target:getDigits().."]", hook.Run("CanPlayerEditData", client, target))

netstream.Start(
		client,
		"diseasesStatusInterfaceOpen",
		target.body,
		prepareStatusesToClientSync(client, target),
		target,
		target:getChar():getData(nut.diseases.stringConsts.blood, 5000))

netstream.Start(
					client,
					"diseasesStatusInterfaceOpen",
					client.body,
					prepareStatusesToClientSync(client, client),
					client,
					client:getChar():getData(nut.diseases.stringConsts.blood, 5000))
netstream.Start("itemSplitAdd", qty, itemID, x, y, invID)
netstream.Start("itemSplitAdd", takeQty >= qty && qty || takeQty, itemID, x, y, invID)
netstream.Start(hookName, itemID, partQty >= qty && qty || partQty, qty)

payload_exprs: "As a reminder, this character is mute. You cannot use speaking commands such as normal ic chat, yell, whisper etc, but you can use the sign language command. Please RP properly, if you do not your character will be banned."
operations.source_call: netstream.Start(ply, "fakechatmessage", "As a reminder, this character is mute. You cannot use speaking commands such as normal ic chat, yell, whisper etc, but you can use the sign language command. Please RP properly, if you do not your character will be banned.")

payload_exprs: "As a reminder, this character cannot understand English. You cannot use or understand default speaking commands such as normal ic chat, yell, whisper etc, but can still use/understand languaged versions if you have the language trait for it, and PDA chat (PDA chat ICly would automatically be translated to whatever language you'd have it set to). Please RP properly, if you do not your character will be banned. This message might display twice."
operations.source_call: netstream.Start(ply, "fakechatmessage", "As a reminder, this character cannot understand English. You cannot use or understand default speaking commands such as normal ic chat, yell, whisper etc, but can still use/understand languaged versions if you have the language trait for it, and PDA chat (PDA chat ICly would automatically be translated to whatever language you'd have it set to). Please RP properly, if you do not your character will be banned. This message might display twice.")
netstream.Start(receiver or client, "charTraits", character:getID(), key, value)

netstream.Start(
				"createCustomItem",
				nameEntry:GetValue(),
				descEntry:GetValue(),
				modelEntry:GetValue(),
				skinEntry:GetValue(),
				bglEntry:GetValue())

netstream.Start(
				"getLockInfo",
				row:GetValue(2),
				self.computer:EntIndex(),
				self.computer:GetUserCardId(),
				self.computer:GetUserCharFaction(),
				self.computer:GetUserDepartment())

netstream.Start(
			activator,
			"compSendUserCardAccess",
			self:EntIndex(),
			self.item:getData("canPlChange", false),
			self.item:getData("canPnChange", false),
			self.item:getData("plFactions", {}),
			self.item:getData("pnFactions", {}),
			nut.gadgets.workShift)
netstream.Start(client, "setUpLocksInfo", "computerInterface", compId, self.replicas, factions, departments, self:EntIndex(), self.lockName)

netstream.Start(
						"inventoryPackAmmo",
						ammoItem[k],
						k,
						qty > ammoNamedTable[k] && ammoNamedTable[k] || qty)

netstream.Start(
			"lampManage",
			self.lamp:EntIndex(),
			tonumber(x:GetValue()) || 0,
			tonumber(y:GetValue()) || 0,
			tonumber(z:GetValue()) || 0,
			farZ,
			newBrightness,
			newR,
			newG,
			newB)

netstream.Start(
			hookName,
			self.ent:EntIndex(),
			waterSliderValue != waterSliderValue && 0 || waterSliderValue,
			sedimentSliderValue != sedimentSliderValue && 0 || sedimentSliderValue,
			container.id)
netstream.Start(client, "cookingPotInterfaceTurnOn", self:EntIndex(), self.waterVolume + self.volume > 0, self.foodName, self.waterVolume, self.volume)

netstream.Start(
		client,
		"cookingpotGetCompositionClient",
		self:EntIndex(),
		self.composition,
		self.volume,
		self.waterVolume,
		self:GetStatuses())

netstream.Start(
		client,
		"cookingpotUpdateCompositionClient",
		self:EntIndex(),
		self.composition,
		self.volume,
		self.waterVolume,
		self:GetStatuses())

netstream.Start("applyVendorAppearance", entIndex, name:GetValue(), desc:GetValue(), model:GetValue(),
				skin:GetValue(), bodygroups:GetValue())
netstream.Start("itemVendorTradeSet", entIndex, v.uniqueID, qty:GetValue(), price:GetValue(), x:GetValue(), y:GetValue())

netstream.Start("applyVendorPos", entIndex, pos1:GetValue(), pos2:GetValue(), pos3:GetValue(),
				ang1:GetValue(), ang2:GetValue(), ang3:GetValue())
netstream.Start(item.player, "nutViewPaper", item:getID(), item:getData("text", ""), false, item:getData("name", ""), item.name)
netstream.Start(item.player, "nutViewPaper", item:getID(), item:getData("text", ""), true, item:getData("name", ""), item.name, item.len)
netstream.Start(nil, "panel", index, position, angles, w, h, scale, url)
netstream.Start(nil, "txt", index, position, angles, text, scale)
netstream.Start(nil, "mapScn", data, position2 and position or nil)

netstream.Start(
					receiver or client,
					"charData",
					character:getID(),
					key, value
				)
netstream.Start(receiver or client, "charVar", key, value, id)

payload_exprs: hook.Run("PlayerMessageSend", speaker, chatType, text, anonymous, receivers) or text
operations.source_call: netstream.Start(receivers, "cMsg", speaker, chatType, hook.Run("PlayerMessageSend", speaker, chatType, text, anonymous, receivers) or text, anonymous)
netstream.Start(receiver, "nVar", self:EntIndex(), key, nut.net[self] and nut.net[self][key])
netstream.Start(self.player, "charSet", key, value, sendID and self:getID() or nil)

netstream.Start(
			receivers or self:getOwner(),
			"invData",
			self:getID(),
			key,
			value
		)

netstream.Start(
			receivers or self:getOwner(),
			"invQuantity",
			self:getID(),
			self.quantity
		)
netstream.Start(client, "itemSplitTake", qty, itemID, x, y, invID)
